docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $758.71 FILED BY RISHER, CLARENCE AS TO DEFENDANT BARONOCKI, ADAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-01-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-01-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-27-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CLARENCE RISHER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ADAM BARONOCKI IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-27-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-07-2020 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CLARENCE RISHER IS PRESENT VIA PHONE. DEFENDANT ADAM BARONOCKI IS NOT PRESENT. DUE TO CLERICAL ERROR ON PREVIOUS COURT DATE PLAINTIFF IS GIVEN A CONTINUANCE AND INFORMED TO UPDATE HIS SC-100 FORM TO REFLECT THE NEW DATE BEFORE SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506
NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
ORDER RE: CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
